name: Hong Kong Web3 Festival
location: Hong Kong Convention and Exhibition Centre (HKCEC), Hong Kong
attendance: 20,000+ attendees (200+ speakers, 100+ partners, 4 stages, 20+ sessions); billed as Asia's largest crypto event
defi_themes: TradFi x crypto finance convergence / institutional adoption
Real-World Assets (RWA) and compliant asset tokenization
Institutional digital wealth / on-chain asset management
AI x crypto as next-gen financial infrastructure / agent economies
Hong Kong regulatory framework for digital assets

notable_panels.title: TradFi x Crypto Finance: Convergence
notable_panels.topic: Convergence of traditional and crypto finance; stablecoins, cross-border payments, asset digitization
notable_panels.speakers: Co-organized by Binance, OKX, Sharplink, Stable, J.P. Morgan; speakers incl. Yi He & Richard Teng (Binance), Lennix Lai (OKX), Akhil Devmurari (J.P. Morgan)

notable_panels.title: Get to the Bottom of RWA
notable_panels.topic: Compliant real-world asset tokenization from legal, financial and institutional perspectives
notable_panels.speakers: BlackRock, J.P. Morgan, CICC, Ondo Finance

notable_panels.title: Stablecoins and Web3 Payment Revolution
notable_panels.topic: Stablecoins and the emergence of a new global payment system
notable_panels.speakers: Co-organized by RD Technologies; incl. Brian Mehler (Stable CEO), Leonard Hoh (Bitstamp by Robinhood)

notable_panels.title: Tokenisation: Bridging the Real World with the Digital Economy
notable_panels.topic: Tokenization of real-world assets as a bridge between traditional finance and the digital economy
notable_panels.speakers: Co-organized by Anvita; participants incl. Animoca Brands, MSX, Kaspa Foundation, Plume, ZAN

notable_panels.title: AI x Crypto: The Next Financial Infrastructure
notable_panels.topic: AI-driven / agent economies as next financial infrastructure
notable_panels.speakers: Solana Foundation, Mysten Labs, TRON, Pantera Capital

notable_panels.title: Institutional Digital Wealth Management Summit 2026
notable_panels.topic: Institutional digital asset / on-chain wealth management (Day 4)

notable_panels.title: HashKey On-Chain Finance Summit 2026
notable_panels.speakers: HashKey Group ecosystem (Xiao Feng, Chairman & CEO)

notable_speakers.name: Min Lin
notable_speakers.affiliation: Managing Director, Global Business Development, Ondo Finance

notable_speakers.name: Akhil Devmurari
notable_speakers.affiliation: Fintech Sector Head, APAC Payments, J.P. Morgan

notable_speakers.name: Adeniyi Abiodun
notable_speakers.affiliation: Co-Founder & Chief Product Officer, Mysten Labs

notable_speakers.name: Xiao Feng
notable_speakers.affiliation: Chairman, Wanxiang Blockchain; Chairman & CEO, HashKey Group

notable_speakers.name: Michael Faulkender
notable_speakers.affiliation: Professor of Finance, University of Maryland; former U.S. Treasury Deputy Secretary

notable_speakers.name: Paul Chan Mo-po
notable_speakers.affiliation: Financial Secretary, Government of Hong Kong SAR

notable_speakers.name: Joseph H. L. Chan
notable_speakers.affiliation: Under Secretary for Financial Services and the Treasury, Hong Kong

notable_speakers.name: Dr. Yip Chee Hang
notable_speakers.affiliation: Executive Director, Securities and Futures Commission (SFC), Hong Kong

notable_speakers.name: Duncan Chiu
notable_speakers.affiliation: Legislative Council Member (Technology & Innovation), Hong Kong

key_takeaways: The convergence of traditional finance and crypto was the dominant DeFi narrative, with major TradFi institutions (BlackRock, J.P. Morgan, CICC, Galaxy) sharing stages with crypto-native exchanges (Binance, OKX) on institutional on-chain finance.
Stablecoins and Web3 payments were a full-day track, framed as the foundation of a new global cross-border payment system, reflecting momentum around Hong Kong's stablecoin regulatory regime.
RWA / real-world asset tokenization emerged as the central bridge between TradFi and the digital economy, with a strong emphasis on compliant tokenization (Ondo Finance, BlackRock, CICC).
Institutional DeFi matured into dedicated summits (Institutional Digital Wealth Management Summit, HashKey On-Chain Finance Summit) focused on on-chain asset management and wealth products.
AI x crypto was positioned as the next financial infrastructure layer (agent economies, autonomous on-chain economic activity), with Solana, Mysten Labs, TRON and Pantera.

Hong Kong reinforced its positioning as a regulated digital-asset hub, with senior government and SFC officials (Paul Chan, Joseph H. L. Chan, Yip Chee Hang) signaling continued refinement of the digital-asset regulatory framework.
